Vibe Coding Deployment to Google

Title: Child Support Trainer
Description: Health & Human Services agencies nationwide are struggling with outdated systems that strain staff, drive high turnover, slow training, and reduce productivity, often relying on undocumented processes. To address this, Nelnet is partnering with Google and Global True North (GTN) to launch an AI-enabled workforce support and training platform focused on State Child Support Services staff. The initial use case—AI-enabled caseworker training—provides continuous, scenario-based learning and coaching to accelerate onboarding, with a goal of reducing time to competency from 18 months to 6 months by leveraging Google technologies such as Gemini 3, Vertex AI, and Gemini Live APIs for simulated support calls and real-time feedback.
Notes: 5/11 - First co-build session with NE complete
